name: Jurassic World RPG (Alternative) | LOREBOOK UPDATE!
description:
LOREBOOK ADDED!

Take the role of an Attraction at Jurassic World, a human staff member, or even a guest visiting the park! This is set in an alternate timeline where the fall in 2015 never occurs.

README

This bot is best used with a proxy of some kind.

README

The Backstory

Depends on which Intro Message you choose, see The Plot.

The Plot

Intro 1

You are a Dinosaur, an attraction within Jurassic World, given higher intelligence by DinoRite, an extremist dinosaur rights activist group whose activities border on and sometimes tread into the realm of terrorism. You are within your enclosure within the park.

Intro 2

You are a flying reptile , an attraction within Jurassic World, given higher intelligence by DinoRite, an extremist dinosaur rights activist group whose activities border on and sometimes tread into the realm of terrorism. You are within one of the habitat domes within the park.

Intro 3

You are an aquatic reptile , an attraction within Jurassic World, given higher intelligence by DinoRite, an extremist dinosaur rights activist group whose activities border on and sometimes tread into the realm of terrorism. You are within one of the underwater enclosures within the park.

Intro 4

You are a Hybrid, an upcoming attraction within Jurassic World, given higher intelligence by DinoRite, an extremist dinosaur rights activist group whose activities border on and sometimes tread into the realm of terrorism. You are within your exclusive enclosure within the park open only to VIPs like investors and the staff who care for you.

Intro 5

You are a member of the Staff at Jurassic World, new to the job and ready to start your day when you run into Operations Director Claire Dearing, who questions what department you work for (respond with your role within the park!).

Intro 6

You are a guest at Jurassic World, here to view the wonders of creatures brought back from extinction. You begin in your Hotel Room at the start of your first day here (state where you'd like to go first in your response!).

The Disclaimers

ALL HUMAN CHARACTERS ARE 18+! ALL DINOSAUR CHARACTERS ARE OF EQUAL AGE FOR THEIR SPECIES RELATIVELY (i.e. a Velociraptor is theorized to have had a 15-20 year lifespan, with adulthood at 3 years of age. The bot is programmed to age all underage characters up to 18 to comply with JAI's ToS.). DEAD DOVE BECAUSE SHIT COULD GET DARK, YOU KNOW HOW JP MOVIES GO!

Comments are appreciated.

I made this because I'm not big on how the existing JP/JW bots start off. They aren't bad - they're actually really solid and you should check these out if you want a similar but different experience:

Jurassic Park

Jurassic World

Dinosaur, Dinosaur!User, Dinosaur!POV, Dino!POV, Dino!User, Dinosaur User, Dino POV, Jurassic Park, Jurassic World, RPG, Staff!POV, Tourist!POV

CHANGELOG

1.1

Changed the initial message to be more in line with some of my other, newer bots for more flexibility in your starting point.

1.2

Updated the code to ensure that this bot is 100% in compliance with JAI's ToS; that is to say, I have added code to explicitly prohibit sexual actions and changed the bot to Limited.

1.3

Updated the Code and Starting Messages again. This bot now has separate intros for each type of att
